entities.description: A statistical method used for clustering accessions based on diversity

entities.name: INDIA

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The goal of utilizing genetic diversity for developing better crop varieties

entities.name: NATURAL SELECTION
entities.description: A biological process influencing the evolution of landraces

entities.name: GENE-FLOW
entities.description: The transfer of genetic material between populations influencing landrace evolution
